{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei qq). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (aqqroximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (aqqroximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for aqqroximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei qq). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (aqqroximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (aqqroximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for aqqroximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf "Kuki-Washimiya Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei qq). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (aqqroximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (aqqroximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for aqqroximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf "Kuki-Washimiya Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei qq). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (aqqroximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (aqqroximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for aqqroximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei qq). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated aqqroximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (aqqroximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (aqqroximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for aqqroximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated a11roximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated a11roximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (a11roximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (a11roximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for a11roximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf "Kuki-Washimiya Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html Kuki Walking Map - Ancient Course] - {{ill|Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|ja|久喜市商工会}} Homepage * Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年}} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year }} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27).『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year }} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year }} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year }} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! revision.text:
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year }} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year }} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year }} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year }} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year }} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year }} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year }} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year }} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated [[Category:pp error]]approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" ([[Category:pp error]]approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for [[Category:pp error]]approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|12=draft}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|12=draft}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year|12=draft}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=draft}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|12=draft}} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=draft}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=draft}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year|12=draft}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿|12=draft}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居|12=draft}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=draft}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬|12=draft}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|12=draft}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=draft}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=draft}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|12=draft}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=draft}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|12=draft}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|12=draft}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=draft}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|12=draft}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅|12=draft}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=draft}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=draft}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf "Kuki Station West Exit Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf "Kuki-Washimiya Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html Kuki Walking Map - Ancient Course] - {{ill|Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|ja|久喜市商工会|12=draft}} Homepage * [http://glassesmaiden.blog81.fc2.com/blog-entry-1267.html "Ontake Shrine (Honcho 1-chome)"] - Shrine Guda Guda Visit Records Homepage (Personal Site) {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Kuki]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[Category:completion tier 5]] [[Category:C tier 1]] [[Category:1 revision imported]] [[Category:New]] }} [[sn:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] [[sn:ntake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[en:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)}}

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|12=draft}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市|12=draft}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命|12=draft}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊|12=draft}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|12=draft}} |rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市|12=draft}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|12=draft}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year|12=draft}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=draft}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|12=draft}} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=draft}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=draft}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year|12=draft}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿|12=draft}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居|12=draft}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=draft}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬|12=draft}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|12=draft}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=draft}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=draft}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|12=draft}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=draft}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|12=draft}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|12=draft}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=draft}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|12=draft}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅|12=draft}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=draft}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=draft}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=draft|12=draft}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|12=draft|12=draft}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=draft|12=draft}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|12=draft|12=draft}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=draft|12=draft}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|12=draft|12=draft}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|12=draft|12=draft}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅|12=draft|12=draft}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=draft|12=draft}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=draft|12=draft}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo!
