{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year}} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! revision.comment: 22 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町) up to rev 102266207
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 御嶽神社 |画像 = [[ファイル:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
拝殿（2012年7月） |所在地 = [[埼玉県]][[久喜市]]本町1丁目1200 | 緯度度 = 36 | 緯度分 = 4 | 緯度秒 = 14.1 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 139 |経度分 = 40 | 経度秒 = 8.5 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E |祭神 = [[大己貴命]]
[[国常立尊]]
[[少彦名命]] |社格 = |創建 = 1887年 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（おんたけじんじゃ）は、[[埼玉県]][[久喜市]]本町1丁目1200に所在する[[神社]]である。 == 概要 == 久喜地区での御嶽神社は、この御嶽神社が[[1887年]]（[[明治]]20年）に[[南埼玉郡]]久喜本町（明治合併後、[[南埼玉郡]][[久喜市#旧久喜町|久喜町]][[大字]]久喜本[[小字|字]]荒鎌）に祀られたのが始まりであり、その後、大字久喜新字新町の[[御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|御嶽神社]]（今日の南1丁目の御嶽神社）が[[1894年]]（[[明治]]27年）より祀られるようになった『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行。この御嶽神社の南隣にはかつて[[千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|千勝神社]]が鎮座していたが、[[埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|六万部久喜停車場線]]の新道建設の折にその大部分が道路用地となってしまったため、[[1999年]]（[[平成]]11年）5月に約300[[メートル|m]]北西の本町六丁目6-3-5（旧地名：大字久喜本字道合693-5）に[[遷座]]された。 境内施設として[[本殿]]、[[鳥居]]、「御嶽教 寿幹教会 御嶽神社」と彫られた標柱、[[カシ|樫]]の[[木]]（[[御神木]]）、[[灯籠]]、[[狛犬]]（[[1988年]]（[[昭和]]63年）11月[[奉納]]）、「御嶽教寿幹教会社殿再建記念碑」と彫られた[[石碑]]、「道展霊神」と彫られた石碑、「森吉霊神」と彫られた石碑、「吉瑞霊神」と彫られた石碑、「賢心霊神」と彫られた石碑、「祐心霊神」と彫られた石碑などである。 == 市内の御嶽神社 == * [[御嶽神社 (久喜市南)]] - 南1丁目に所在。 上記の他、他の名称の神社に[[合祀]]や[[境内社]]の形で御嶽神社が祀られている場合もある。（吉羽字前の[[吉羽天満宮]]など。） == 関連項目・周辺 == * 瑠璃山[[光明寺 (久喜市)|光明寺]] * [[光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|薬師堂]] - 御嶽神社正面の[[道路]]を挟んだ東側に所在。 * [[千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|千勝神社]] - 南隣に所在していたが、[[埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|六万部久喜停車場線]]新道建設の折に道路予定地となり、約300[[メートル|m]]北西の本町6丁目に[[遷座]]された。 * 永安山[[甘棠院]] * [[天王院 (久喜市)|天王院]] * [[久喜市立久喜小学校]] == アクセス == * [[久喜駅]]西口より[[朝日バス]]菖蒲仲橋行に乗車、「本町1丁目（乗車約3分）」下車、北方へ[[徒歩所要時間|徒歩]]約1分。（[[運賃]]100円） * 久喜駅西口の[[久喜市内循環バス]]のりばから「久喜本循環　右回り」または「六万部・北中曽根循環」に乗車、「斉藤医院前（乗車約3分）」にて下車、北側へ徒歩約2分。運賃はいずれも100円（1日乗車券は200円）。[https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html （市内循環バス　久喜市ホームページ）] * 久喜駅西口より西北西へ（[[埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|六万部久喜停車場線]]沿いに）[[徒歩所要時間|徒歩]]にて約12分（道程約700[[メートル|m]]）[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl 御嶽神社周辺] - Yahoo!ロコ　ホームページ。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf 「久喜駅西口コース」　久喜市観光ウォーキングマップ]}} - 久喜市ホームページ * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf 「久喜-鷲宮コース」　久喜市観光ウォーキングマップ]}} - 久喜市ホームページ * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html 久喜ウォーキングマップ　いにしえコース] - 久喜市商工会ホームページ * [http://glassesmaiden.blog81.fc2.com/blog-entry-1267.html 「御嶽神社（本町一丁目）」] - 神社ぐだぐだ参拝録 ホームページ（個人ページ） {{Shinto-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:おんたけしんしや}} [[Category:久喜市の神社]] [[Category:御嶽神社]]

[[国常立尊]]
[[少彦名命]] |社格 = |創建 = 1887年 |本殿 = |別名 = |例祭 = |神事 = }} '''御嶽神社'''（おんたけじんじゃ）は、[[埼玉県]][[久喜市]]本町1丁目1200に所在する[[神社]]である。 == 概要 == 久喜地区での御嶽神社は、この御嶽神社が[[1887年]]（[[明治]]20年）に[[南埼玉郡]]久喜本町（明治合併後、[[南埼玉郡]][[久喜市#旧久喜町|久喜町]][[大字]]久喜本[[小字|字]]荒鎌）に祀られたのが始まりであり、その後、大字久喜新字新町の[[御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|御嶽神社]]（今日の南1丁目の御嶽神社）が[[1894年]]（[[明治]]27年）より祀られるようになった『平成19年度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20年2月16日 発行。この御嶽神社の南隣にはかつて[[千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|千勝神社]]が鎮座していたが、[[埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|六万部久喜停車場線]]の新道建設の折にその大部分が道路用地となってしまったため、[[1999年]]（[[平成]]11年）5月に約300[[メートル|m]]北西の本町六丁目6-3-5（旧地名：大字久喜本字道合693-5）に[[遷座]]された。 境内施設として[[本殿]]、[[鳥居]]、「御嶽教 寿幹教会 御嶽神社」と彫られた標柱、[[カシ|樫]]の[[木]]（[[御神木]]）、[[灯籠]]、[[狛犬]]（[[1988年]]（[[昭和]]63年）11月[[奉納]]）、「御嶽教寿幹教会社殿再建記念碑」と彫られた[[石碑]]、「道展霊神」と彫られた石碑、「森吉霊神」と彫られた石碑、「吉瑞霊神」と彫られた石碑、「賢心霊神」と彫られた石碑、「祐心霊神」と彫られた石碑などである。 == 市内の御嶽神社 == * [[御嶽神社 (久喜市南)]] - 南1丁目に所在。 上記の他、他の名称の神社に[[合祀]]や[[境内社]]の形で御嶽神社が祀られている場合もある。（吉羽字前の[[吉羽天満宮]]など。） == 関連項目・周辺 == * 瑠璃山[[光明寺 (久喜市)|光明寺]] * [[光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|薬師堂]] - 御嶽神社正面の[[道路]]を挟んだ東側に所在。 * [[千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|千勝神社]] - 南隣に所在していたが、[[埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|六万部久喜停車場線]]新道建設の折に道路予定地となり、約300[[メートル|m]]北西の本町6丁目に[[遷座]]された。 * 永安山[[甘棠院]] * [[天王院 (久喜市)|天王院]] * [[久喜市立久喜小学校]] == アクセス == * [[久喜駅]]西口より[[朝日バス]]菖蒲仲橋行に乗車、「本町1丁目（乗車約3分）」下車、北方へ[[徒歩所要時間|徒歩]]約1分。（[[運賃]]100円） * 久喜駅西口の[[久喜市内循環バス]]のりばから「久喜本循環　右回り」または「六万部・北中曽根循環」に乗車、「斉藤医院前（乗車約3分）」にて下車、北側へ徒歩約2分。運賃はいずれも100円（1日乗車券は200円）。[https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html （市内循環バス　久喜市ホームページ）] * 久喜駅西口より西北西へ（[[埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|六万部久喜停車場線]]沿いに）[[徒歩所要時間|徒歩]]にて約12分（道程約700[[メートル|m]]）[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl 御嶽神社周辺] - Yahoo!ロコ　ホームページ。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf 「久喜駅西口コース」　久喜市観光ウォーキングマップ]}} - 久喜市ホームページ * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf 「久喜-鷲宮コース」　久喜市観光ウォーキングマップ]}} - 久喜市ホームページ * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html 久喜ウォーキングマップ　いにしえコース] - 久喜市商工会ホームページ * [http://glassesmaiden.blog81.fc2.com/blog-entry-1267.html 「御嶽神社（本町一丁目）」] - 神社ぐだぐだ参拝録 ホームページ（個人ページ） {{Shinto-stub}} {{デフォルトソート:おんたけしんしや}} [[Category:久喜市の神社]] [[Category:御嶽神社]]

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year}} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=draft}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|qq=draft}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市|qq=draft}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国常立尊|qq=draft}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|qq=draft}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市|qq=draft}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|qq=draft}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year|qq=draft}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|qq=draft}} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year|qq=draft}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿|qq=draft}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居|qq=draft}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬|qq=draft}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|qq=draft}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|qq=draft}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅|qq=draft}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1999|qq=}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/main shrine (honden)|qq=}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/torii|qq=}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|qq=}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|qq=}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1988|qq=}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|qq=}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|qq=}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Station|qq=}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|qq=}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf "Kuki Station West Exit Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf "Kuki-Washimiya Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html Kuki Walking Map - Ancient Course] - {{ill|Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|ja|久喜市商工会|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|qq=}} Homepage * [http://glassesmaiden.blog81.fc2.com/blog-entry-1267.html "Ontake Shrine (Honcho 1-chome)"] - Shrine Guda Guda Visit Records Homepage (Personal Site) {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)|version=102266207|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Kuki]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[sn:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] [[sn:ntake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[en:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]]

{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG|250px]]
Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki|qq=}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国之常立神|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi|2=ja|3=国之常立神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotokotachi|qq=}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|qq=}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrine|qq=}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki|qq=}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefecture|qq=}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1887|qq=}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1894|qq=}} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1999|qq=}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/main shrine (honden)|qq=}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/torii|qq=}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|qq=}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|qq=}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988th year|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1988|qq=}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|qq=}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|qq=}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Station|qq=}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|qq=}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Haiden (July 2012) |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefecture|qq=}}{{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki|qq=}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=}}
{{ill|Kuninotokotachi|ja|国之常立神|1=Kuni-no-Tokotachi|2=ja|3=国之常立神|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuninotokotachi|qq=}}
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|qq=}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinto shrine|qq=}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki|ja|久喜市|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki|qq=}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|ja|埼玉県|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefecture|qq=}}. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|ja|1887年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1887|qq=}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|ja|1894年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1894|qq=}} (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|ja|1999年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1999|qq=}} (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|main shrine (honden)|ja|本殿|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/main shrine (honden)|qq=}}, a {{ill|torii|ja|鳥居|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/torii|qq=}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|qq=}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|ja|狛犬|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|qq=}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|ja|1988年|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1988|qq=}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|qq=}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|qq=}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=}} == Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station|ja|久喜駅|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Station|qq=}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|qq=}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf "Kuki Station West Exit Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf "Kuki-Washimiya Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html Kuki Walking Map - Ancient Course] - {{ill|Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|ja|久喜市商工会|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|qq=}} Homepage * [http://glassesmaiden.blog81.fc2.com/blog-entry-1267.html "Ontake Shrine (Honcho 1-chome)"] - Shrine Guda Guda Visit Records Homepage (Personal Site) {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)|version=102266207|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Kuki]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[sn:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] [[sn:ntake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[en:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]]

Haiden (July 2012) |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]] Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36|4|14.1|N|139|40|8.5|E|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|ja|大己貴命|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōkuninushi|qq=}}
[[:en:Kuni-no-Tokotachi|Kuni-no-Tokotachi]]
{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|qq=}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, [[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|qq=}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|qq=}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|qq=}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=}} == Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|qq=}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf "Kuki Station West Exit Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf "Kuki-Washimiya Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html Kuki Walking Map - Ancient Course] - {{ill|Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|ja|久喜市商工会|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|qq=}} Homepage * [http://glassesmaiden.blog81.fc2.com/blog-entry-1267.html "Ontake Shrine (Honcho 1-chome)"] - Shrine Guda Guda Visit Records Homepage (Personal Site) {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)|version=102266207|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Kuki]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[sn:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] [[sn:ntake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[en:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[Category:Shrines in Kuki, Saitama]]

{{ill|Sukunabikona|ja|少彦名命|1=Sukunabikona|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|13=User:Immanuelle/Sukunabikona|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to スクナビコナ}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = }} '''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, [[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]]. == Overview == Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|qq=}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|qq=}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=}} == Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage == References == {{Reflist}} == External Links == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf "Kuki Station West Exit Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf "Kuki-Washimiya Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html Kuki Walking Map - Ancient Course] - {{ill|Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|ja|久喜市商工会|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|qq=}} Homepage * [http://glassesmaiden.blog81.fc2.com/blog-entry-1267.html "Ontake Shrine (Honcho 1-chome)"] - Shrine Guda Guda Visit Records Homepage (Personal Site) {{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)|version=102266207|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Kuki]] [[Category:Ontake Shrines]] [[Category:Completion tier 5]] }} [[sn:Ontake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] [[sn:ntake Shrine (Kuki Honcho)]] [[Category:Shrines in Kuki, Saitama]]

Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ　久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』　久喜市市民大学 発行　平成20th year 2月16日 発行 South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11). Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|qq=}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin." == Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City == * {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} - Located in Minami 1-chome. Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|qq=}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}. == Related Sites and Nearby locations == * {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=}} == Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! == Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>

Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=|1=Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|qq=|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=|1=Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|qq=|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=|1=Yakushido (Kuki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=|1=Tenno-in (Kuki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11488966]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:49, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]] Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36.070583|N|139.669028|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|qid=Q276944}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = |location = {{ill|Kuki|qid=Q47535}} }}
'''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, [[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].
== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|qq=|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|qq=|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>

* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}

Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q11488966]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:49, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]] Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36.070583|N|139.669028|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|qid=Q276944}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = |location = {{ill|Kuki|qid=Q47535}} }}
'''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, [[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].
== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|qq=|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|qq=|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>

== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|qq=|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|qq=|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|qq=|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|qq=|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|qq=|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|qq=|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|qq=|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>
