<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11488966]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:49, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]] Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36.070583|N|139.669028|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = |location = {{ill|Kuki|WD=Q47535}} }}
'''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, [[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].
== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>

Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11488966]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:49, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]] Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36.070583|N|139.669028|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = |location = {{ill|Kuki|WD=Q47535}} }}
'''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, [[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].
== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>

However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.

Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11488966]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:49, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]] Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36.070583|N|139.669028|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = |location = {{ill|Kuki|WD=Q47535}} }}
'''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, [[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].
== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>
== References == {{Reflist}}
== External Links == * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map02.pdf "Kuki Station West Exit Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * {{PDFlink|[https://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/miryoku/kanko_tokusan/map2.files/map010.pdf "Kuki-Washimiya Course" Sightseeing Walking Map]}} - Kuki City Homepage * [http://kuki-sci.sakura.ne.jp/midokoro/pg118.html Kuki Walking Map - Ancient Course] - {{ill|Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|ja|久喜市商工会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|1=Kuki City Chamber of Commerce|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17214116}} Homepage * [http://glassesmaiden.blog81.fc2.com/blog-entry-1267.html "Ontake Shrine (Honcho 1-chome)"] - Shrine Guda Guda Visit Records Homepage (Personal Site)
{{translated page|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)|version=102266207|comment=Imported full ja history}}

Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11488966]] Wikidata name: (none) [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:49, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG |location = [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]][[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]] Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36.070583|N|139.669028|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = |location = {{ill|Kuki|WD=Q47535}} }}
'''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, [[:en:Kuki, Saitama|Kuki]], [[:en:Saitama Prefecture|Saitama Prefecture]].
== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in [[:en:1887|1887]] (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in [[:en:1894|1894]] (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==

== Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>

However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in [[:en:1999|1999]] (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the [[:en:Honden|main shrine (honden)]], a [[:en:Torii|torii]], a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, [[:en:Komainu|guardian lion-dogs (komainu)]] (dedicated in November [[:en:1988|1988]] (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From [[:en:Kuki Station (Saitama)|Kuki Station]] West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>

== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|en|1887|WD=Q7826|lt=1887}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894}} (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|en|1999|WD=Q2091|lt=1999}} (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|Honden|en|Honden|WD=Q2044994|lt=main shrine (honden)}}, a {{ill|Torii|en|Torii|WD=Q234731|lt=torii}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|Komainu|en|Komainu|WD=Q20155846|lt=guardian lion-dogs (komainu)}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|en|1988|WD=Q2426|lt=1988}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:御嶽神社 (久喜市本町)]]
{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|WD=Q47535|lt=Kuki}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36.070583|N|139.669028|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = |location = {{ill|Kuki|WD=Q47535}} }}
'''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|WD=Q47535|lt=Kuki}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture}}.
== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|en|1887|WD=Q7826|lt=1887}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894}} (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|en|1999|WD=Q2091|lt=1999}} (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|Honden|en|Honden|WD=Q2044994|lt=main shrine (honden)}}, a {{ill|Torii|en|Torii|WD=Q234731|lt=torii}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|Komainu|en|Komainu|WD=Q20155846|lt=guardian lion-dogs (komainu)}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|en|1988|WD=Q2426|lt=1988}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station (Saitama)|en|Kuki Station (Saitama)|WD=Q843719|lt=Kuki Station}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>

* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|1=Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station (Saitama)|en|Kuki Station (Saitama)|WD=Q843719|lt=Kuki Station}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|WD=Q47535|lt=Kuki|1=Kuki, Saitama}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36.070583|N|139.669028|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = |location = {{ill|Kuki|WD=Q47535|1=Kuki, Saitama}} }}
'''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|WD=Q47535|lt=Kuki|1=Kuki, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}.
== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|en|1887|WD=Q7826|lt=1887|1=1887}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894|1=1894}} (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|en|1999|WD=Q2091|lt=1999|1=1999}} (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|Honden|en|Honden|WD=Q2044994|lt=main shrine (honden)|1=Honden}}, a {{ill|Torii|en|Torii|WD=Q234731|lt=torii|1=Torii}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|Komainu|en|Komainu|WD=Q20155846|lt=guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|1=Komainu}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|en|1988|WD=Q2426|lt=1988|1=1988}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.

== Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station (Saitama)|en|Kuki Station (Saitama)|WD=Q843719|lt=Kuki Station|1=Kuki Station (Saitama)}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |name = Ontake Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Kuki Honcho Ontake Shrine Haiden 1.JPG |location = {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}{{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|WD=Q47535|lt=Kuki|1=Kuki, Saitama}} Honcho 1-chome 1200 |coordinates = {{Coord|36.070583|N|139.669028|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |country_code = JP |deity = {{ill|Ōkuninushi|WD=Q276944|1=Ōkuninushi}} |Rank = |established = 1887 |main_building = |alternate_name = |festival = |location = {{ill|Kuki|WD=Q47535|1=Kuki, Saitama}} }}
'''Ontake Shrine''' (御嶽神社, Ontake-jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Honcho 1-chome 1200, {{ill|Kuki, Saitama|en|Kuki, Saitama|WD=Q47535|lt=Kuki|1=Kuki, Saitama}}, {{ill|Saitama Prefecture|en|Saitama Prefecture|WD=Q128186|lt=Saitama Prefecture|1=Saitama Prefecture}}.
== Overview ==
Ontake Shrine in the Kuki district was established in {{ill|1887|en|1887|WD=Q7826|lt=1887|1=1887}} (Meiji 20) in Minami-Saitama District, Kuki Honcho (renamed Oaza Kuki Honcho after the Meiji mergers). Later, the {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} in Minami 1-chome was enshrined in {{ill|1894|en|1894|WD=Q7843|lt=1894|1=1894}} (Meiji 27).<ref>『平成19th year 度 久喜市市民大学 大学院研究論文集Ⅰ 久喜市神社と神域の護持像、狛犬の調査（145ページ、152ページ）』 久喜市市民大学 発行 平成20th year 2月16日 発行</ref>
South of this Ontake Shrine, {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} once stood. However, during the construction of a new road for the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}}, most of its precinct became part of the road site. As a result, it was relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome 6-3-5 (formerly Oaza Kuki Honcho Doai 693-5) in {{ill|1999|en|1999|WD=Q2091|lt=1999|1=1999}} (Heisei 11).
Facilities within the precinct include the {{ill|Honden|en|Honden|WD=Q2044994|lt=main shrine (honden)|1=Honden}}, a {{ill|Torii|en|Torii|WD=Q234731|lt=torii|1=Torii}}, a stone pillar inscribed with "Ontakekyo Jukan Church Ontake Shrine," a {{ill|evergreen oak|ja|カシ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/evergreen oak|1=Cyclobalanopsis|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q796117}} sacred tree (goshinboku), stone lanterns, {{ill|Komainu|en|Komainu|WD=Q20155846|lt=guardian lion-dogs (komainu)|1=Komainu}} (dedicated in November {{ill|1988|en|1988|WD=Q2426|lt=1988|1=1988}} (Showa 63)), and several commemorative stone monuments inscribed with names such as "Michiten Reijin," "Moriyoshi Reijin," "Kizui Reijin," "Kenshin Reijin," and "Yushin Reijin."
== Other Ontake Shrines in Kuki City ==
* {{ill|Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|ja|御嶽神社 (久喜市南)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ontake Shrine (Kuki Minami)|1=Mitake Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11488965}} - Located in Minami 1-chome.
Additionally, some shrines in the area, such as the {{ill|Yoshiba Tenmangu|ja|吉羽天満宮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yoshiba Tenmangu|1=Yoshiba-tenmangū|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11414217}}, may include Ontake Shrines as {{ill|subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja|境内社|lt=Keinaisha|1=Setsumatsusha|2=ja|3=摂末社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/subordinate shrines (sessha)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 摂末社}} or through {{ill|enshrinement (gōshi)|ja|合祀|1=Shrine Consolidation Policy|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/enshrinement (gōshi)|13=User:Immanuelle/Shrine Consolidation Policy|qq=}}.
== Related Sites and Nearby locations ==
* {{ill|Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja|瑠璃山光明寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rurisan Komyo-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Yakushido (Kuki)|ja|光明寺 (久喜市)#薬師堂|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yakushido (Kuki)|1=Komyo-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11388415}} - Located directly east of Ontake Shrine across the road. * {{ill|Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|ja|千勝神社 (久喜市本町)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chikatsu Shrine (Kuki Honcho)|qq=}} (relocated approximately 300 meters northwest to Honcho 6-chome). * {{ill|Eianzan Kanto-in|ja|永安山甘棠院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Eianzan Kanto-in|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} * {{ill|Tenno-in (Kuki)|ja|天王院 (久喜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenno-in (Kuki)|1=Tennoin Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11443033}} * {{ill|Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|ja|久喜市立久喜小学校|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuki Municipal Kuki Elementary School|1=Q11369222|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11369222}}
== Access == * From {{ill|Kuki Station (Saitama)|en|Kuki Station (Saitama)|WD=Q843719|lt=Kuki Station|1=Kuki Station (Saitama)}} West Exit, take the {{ill|Asahi Bus|ja|朝日バス|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asahi Bus|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 朝日自動車|1=Asahi Motor|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11517584}} bound for Shobu Nakahashi. Alight at "Honcho 1-chome" (approximately 3 minutes), then walk north for about 1 minute (fare: 100 yen). * From the Kuki City Circular Bus stop at Kuki Station West Exit, take either the "Kuki Hon Loop (Right)" or "Rokumanbu/Nakazosone Loop" and alight at "Saito Clinic Front" (approximately 3 minutes). Walk 2 minutes north (fare: 100 yen; 1-day pass: 200 yen). [https://web.archive.org/web/20140222061527/http://www.city.kuki.lg.jp/kurashi/traffic-safety/norimono/bus.html (Kuki City Circular Bus Homepage)] * Walk west-northwest from Kuki Station along the {{ill|Saitama Prefectural Route 146|ja|埼玉県道146号六万部久喜停車場線|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Saitama Prefectural Route 146|1=Saitama Prefectural Road Route 146|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11426853}} for approximately 12 minutes (about 700 meters).<ref>[http://yahoo.jp/o3omvl Ontake Shrine Surroundings] - Yahoo! Loco Homepage</ref>
